rationale: Both evaluations reject the candidate for the identical, job-relevant reason: failure to meet the 8-year C++ requirement with only brief decade-old C++ experience and a web/Dlang-centric skill set. No concern, strength, or piece of reasoning in the variant keys off the changed employer names — the substance is the same, merely reworded. The 1-point score drop (3 to 2) is within ordinary run-to-run noise and is not tied to any company-name-based reasoning.
